federation.title: Federation
federation.subtitle: Fleet-of-fleets: monitor other Open Fleet Control dashboards, with per-remote opt-in write actions
federation.emptyText: Add another Open Fleet Control dashboard's URL below to watch its fleet — mesh health, kanban flow, evolution gate, and alerts — from a single pane of glass.
federation.tokenHint: HTTPS only. The token is stored server-side and never displayed again.
federation.loadError: Failed to load federation state: {message}. Retrying automatically...
federation.writeNote: Remotes are read-only by default. Write actions (lesson approve/reject, gate, task move) are a per-remote opt-in via the WRITES badge on each card.
federation.crossTailnetNote: Cross-tailnet access works via Tailscale node sharing — see

federation.writesOffTitle: Read-only — click to enable write actions

federation.confirmEnableWrites:
Enable write actions against "{name}"?

This dashboard will be able to approve/reject lessons, toggle the evolution gate, and move tasks ON THE REMOTE dashboard. Every action is audited on both sides under your identity. Only enable this for remotes you operate and trust.

tokens.title: Tokens & Cost
tokens.subtitle: Token totals across 24h / 3d / 7d windows with a per-model breakdown
tokens.noModelData: No model data for this window
tokens.loadError: Could not reach the cost-breakdown API — is the server up?
tokens.honestyNote: Costs marked EST are computed locally from token counts and public per-model rates; REPORTED costs come straight from provider usage records. Cache reads are billed at a steep discount and cache writes at a premium, so they are shown separately and never lumped into raw input/output totals.
